name: Cloudflare Agents SDK
description: TypeScript SDK for building stateful AI agents on Cloudflare Durable Objects. Built-in SQL state, WebSocket, task scheduling, MCP client/server, and browser tools.

skills.name: Stateful Agents
skills.description: Build agents with persistent SQL state in Durable Objects that survives restarts and scales globally

skills.name: MCP Client & Server
skills.description: Ship MCP servers and connect to MCP tools from inside your agent with built-in protocol support

skills.name: Task Scheduling
skills.description: Schedule tasks and crons natively inside your Durable Object agent with zero external dependencies

skills.name: Browser Tools
skills.description: Give your agent browser access for web scraping using Cloudflare Browser Rendering integration

skills.name: Deploy via CLI
skills.description: Deploy agents globally with npx create-cloudflare and wrangler deploy — no server configuration needed
